_verification: Verify against CEC Rule 28-604 and manufacturer switch ratings before field use.

motor.note: Motor disconnecting means: ampere rating at least 115% of motor FLC, and must be horsepower-rated (or a suitable general-use switch per 28-602 exceptions for small motors).

general.note: Non-motor loads: switch rated at least the continuous load current; apply 80% continuous-loading rules of the feeder calculation upstream, not in the switch selection itself.

fusibleNote: Choose fusible where the disconnect also provides branch/feeder OCPD (fuse class per fuse module); non-fusible where protection exists upstream and only isolation is required.
